# Quality Near Miss

Three bullets below almost match the observation or relation grammar, but
each has a small typo that would otherwise make it vanish silently.

-[missing-space] a dash directly followed by a bracket
- [unclosed-category some text with no closing bracket
- relates_to [[Unclosed Target]
